## Editing.FieldValidator.string() method

Create a string field validator. Checks that value is a non-empty string.

**Signature:**

```typescript
static string<T, K extends keyof T>(fieldName: K, options?: {
        maxLength?: number;
        minLength?: number;
    }): FieldValidator<T, K>;
```
